_doc: Human-verified ground-truth facts applied AFTER decode/merge, BEFORE isolate-prune, on every rebuild. These OVERRIDE LLM decode errors. Source: daddy + Mossin 'The Awakener' biography, cross-checked. The decode under-extracts Guruji's real lineage and over-extracts the popular Yogananda one — this file is the corrective. See memory sharma-lineage and guru-continuity-babaji-spine.

entities.name: Satyacharan Lahiri
entities.note: Lahiri Mahasaya's GRANDSON (son of Tinkori). The 4th Guru. Sharma's DIRECT initiating guru (2nd-level Kriya, 28 Apr 1984). Decode caught him as a floating name (55 source mentions) but missed his guru-edges -> he was pruned as an isolate.

entities.name: Tinkori Lahiri
entities.note: Lahiri Mahasaya's eldest son. The 3rd Guru. Father of Satyacharan.

entities.name: Shailendra Sharma
entities.note: The 5th Guru of the Lahiri-family Kriya line. Bharadwaja gotra. Directly initiated by Satyacharan Lahiri.

lineage_edges.evidence: curated: root of the Kriya parampara
curated: Kriya transmission to his son

remove_edges.reason: Yogananda is NOT in Sharma's chain. He is on the parallel Babaji->Lahiri->Yukteshwar->Yogananda (Autobiography-of-a-Yogi) branch, which diverges at Lahiri. Do not present it as Guruji's lineage.
Backwards edge: Babaji is Lahiri's GURU, not disciple. The correct direction is the curated babaji guru_of lahiri above.
Backwards: Himmat Bahadur Sharma is Guruji's FATHER, not his son.

WRONG: Sharma does NOT succeed Yogananda. They are on SEPARATE forks of Lahiri's tree (Yogananda via Yukteshwar = Western/Autobiography branch; Sharma via the family branch Tinkori->Satyacharan). This survivor edge slipped past the lahiri/disciple remove-rule because it is keyed shailendra-sharma/successor. Confirmed still present in the 2026-06-24 rebuilt manifest.

Backwards: the corpus has Babaji guru_of Shankaracharya (the chandala-initiation legend); the inverse disciple edge is a decode directionality artifact. Same bug family as babaji/disciple/lahiri above.

split_forms.reason: The THREE Ramas bug (flagged twice). graph.py's bare-name guard severs 'Balarama' from Rama, but Balarama's distinct EPITHETS slip through one level deeper. Halayudha/Halī = 'plough-armed'; Revatīśa = 'lord of Revati'; Chalabhṛdrāma = Balabhadra-Rama. All Balarama (Krishna's brother), NOT Ramachandra.
Parashurama epithet ('crusher of Jamadagni's-son's pride') misfused into the Ramachandra node. Parashurama (axe-warrior, Jamadagni's son) is a SEPARATE Vishnu avatar.
